dc:subject: Biological Sciences
History of Science
India
NCBS

Research History
dublin_core.dc:description: A collection documenting the contributions of pioneering scientists to biological sciences research in India from 1950 to 2020.
dublin_core.dc:publisher: National Centre for Biological Sciences, TIFR
dublin_core.dc:rights: Copyright NCBS-TIFR. Permission required for publication.

series.title: Personal Correspondence
series.description: Letters, telegrams and personal communications between pioneering scientists and their contemporaries across Indian and international institutions.

series.title: Research Notes and Manuscripts
series.description: Handwritten and typed research notes, draft manuscripts, laboratory notebooks, and field notes documenting original scientific inquiry across multiple disciplines.

series.title: Photographs and Visual Materials
series.description: Photographs documenting field expeditions, laboratory settings, conferences, and institutional life across six decades of biological sciences research in India.
